positive.literal: wide establishing shot, cover art, key art composition, ground plane visible

laneRules: CANON LAW — DIEGETIC vs PROMOTIONAL: the world-card is COVER ART, exempt from the starter-zone tower ban. The Tower IS allowed/encouraged here — set the `horizon` slot to the canonical 'distant impossible tower on the horizon' literal. Posters obey the PROMISE of the world, not the viewpoint of a person standing in the starter zone; scene art (diegetic) obeys the viewpoint.
world-card rides the scene RECIPE lane for routing but uses THIS template for prompt assembly (cover framing, tower-permitted).
